title: Boss Weapons
description: This pack rewards you for beating any of Minecraft's Bosses with a custom Weapon
body:
This pack rewards you for beating any of Minecraft's Bosses:

Ender Dragon

32-63 Dragon's Breath,
2-19 Ender Pearls,
1-5 Eye of Ender,
1 Dragon Head,
1 Ender Bow(See Gallery)

Wither

32-63 Bones,
2-7 Soul Sand,
1-2 Wither Skeleton Skulls,
1 Nether Star,
1 Withered Blade(See Gallery)

Elder Guardian

32-63 Prismarine Crystals,
2-19 Raw Cod,
1-5 Wet Sponge,
1 Prismarine Shard,
1 Elder Trident(Riptide) or 1 Elder Trident(Impaling, Loyalty)

Warden

32-63 Sculk,
2-7 Sculk Catalyst,
2-7 Sculk Sensor,
1 Sculk Shreiker,
1 Warden Axe(See Gallery)

Important: None of these are effected by any level of Looting

If you encounter any problems or bugs message me on discord [beyondtheend](https://discord.com/users/766257043648544779)
